SHORT NAME: CATCOVCD 

LONG NAME: CTSTRPHC_CVRG_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: A = Attachment point met on this event 
C = Above attachment point 
N = Attachment Point met; TrOOP subsequently reduced below the OOP threshold due to payment
